notes: v0.15.3 — MODULES UI polish. Click a slot to open a popup picker (only owned modules that fit + UNEQUIP option). Right-click or X corner to instant-unequip. Drag from slot back to the library = unequip. Rarity overflow fixed (3-letter COM/UNC/RAR/EPC/LEG tags, all text width-clipped). Library is now a compact 2-column grid (no more elongated single rows). Pretty filter chips with NEON slot icons + count badges. Cosmetics row now has visual preview tiles above each cycle button — ship texture, projectile chevron, trail particle fade, shield ring all rendered in the active skin color. Active skills temporarily placeholder (HUD + key triggers disabled, system returns in v0.15.4). Windows only.
